events.summaryZh: 亮点：Docklands 免费 Firelight Festival 有 fire performers、laser show、glow pickleball、fire pits、live music 和 pop-up food，夜间氛围强，适合全家傍晚去。
events.summaryEn: Why go: This free Docklands Firelight Festival brings together fire performers, a laser show, glow pickleball, fire pits, live music and pop-up food for a high-energy family evening.
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official event page.

events.summaryZh: 亮点：Wilson Botanic Park 把动物主题手作、sensory play、fossil dig 和夜场 glowing animals/live reptiles 组合起来，适合喜欢自然和动手玩的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Why go: Wilson Botanic Park combines animal-inspired craft, sensory play, fossil digging and selected evening sessions with glowing animals and live reptiles, making it more substantial than a simple craft stop.
events.referenceZh: City of Casey 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Casey official event listing.

events.summaryZh: 亮点：Bluey 舞台剧在 Comedy Theatre 有早场和午场，时间明确、室内舒适，适合想给孩子一个稳定好安排 outing 的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Why go: Bluey's stage show has clear morning and lunchtime sessions at the Comedy Theatre, giving families a predictable indoor outing around a character kids already know.
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official event page.

events.summaryZh: 亮点：这场互动 family magic show 时间卡在 1:15pm，容易和 Carlton/city 午餐或 Melbourne Museum 串成半日，适合想轻松看表演的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Why go: This interactive family magic show lands at 1:15pm, making it easy to pair with Carlton or city lunch and nearby Melbourne Museum for a relaxed half-day.
events.mapQuery: Arrow On Swanston 488 Swanston St Carlton
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official event page.

events.titleZh: General Waste's Kids Shipboard Tour & Treasure Hunt
events.titleEn: General Waste's Kids Shipboard Tour & Treasure Hunt
events.summaryZh: 亮点：MV Steve Irwin 的 treasure hunt、eco-challenges 和 mission 把船、海洋和探索任务放在真实场景里，适合喜欢动手任务的孩子和大人一起玩。
events.summaryEn: Why go: The MV Steve Irwin tour turns ships, oceans and eco-challenges into a hands-on treasure-hunt setting, so it works for kids who like missions and adults who want a real place to explore.
events.placeZh: MV Steve Irwin, Melbourne City Marina
events.placeEn: MV Steve Irwin, Melbourne City Marina
events.mapQuery: MV Steve Irwin Melbourne City Marina Docklands
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official event page.

events.titleZh: Winter School Holidays at Melbourne Museum
events.titleEn: Winter School Holidays at Melbourne Museum
events.summaryZh: 亮点：Melbourne Museum 假期项目把 Our Wondrous Planet、Creative Lab、Mosaic Monuments、sleepovers、Tiny Tours 和 Dino Days 放在同一馆区，适合一站式室内半日。
events.summaryEn: Why go: Melbourne Museum's holiday program gathers Our Wondrous Planet, Creative Lab, Mosaic Monuments, sleepovers, Tiny Tours and Dino Days in one venue, making it a strong indoor half-day backup.
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On / Museums Victoria 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On / Museums Victoria official event page.

events.summaryZh: 亮点：NGV 冬季学校假期有免费 workshops、artist-led activities、Children's Play 和 kids go free 票务优惠，适合把艺术展变成亲子半日。
events.summaryEn: Why go: NGV's winter school-holiday program mixes free workshops, artist-led activities, Children's Play and a kids-go-free offer, helping an art-gallery visit feel more family-friendly.
events.timeZh: Winter 2026，本周多场；出发前按项目确认
events.timeEn: Winter 2026, multiple sessions this week; confirm by program
events.priceZh: 多为免费，部分需预约或购票
events.priceEn: Many free; some require booking or tickets
events.referenceZh: NGV 官方学校假期页面。

events.summaryZh: 亮点：Southern Community Centre 周六羽毛球适合想运动放电的家庭，地点明确、节奏简单，费用和预约出发前看官网确认。
events.summaryEn: Why go: This Saturday badminton session at Southern Community Centre is a simple active option for families who want movement rather than another sit-down event; confirm cost and booking before heading out.
events.placeZh: Southern Community Centre Sports Hall, Mulgrave
events.placeEn: Southern Community Centre Sports Hall, Mulgrave
events.mapQuery: Southern Community Centre 27 Rupert Drive Mulgrave
events.referenceZh: City of Monash 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: City of Monash official event listing.
